title: Street Closing Information for 2023 Arts Week Downtown
summary: Downtown Syracuse will implement street closures July 27-30, 2023 for two major events: the Northeast Jazz & Wine Festival at Clinton Square and the 52nd Annual Syracuse Arts & Crafts Festival at Columbus Circle. Multiple street segments will be fully or partially closed during these dates to accommodate event setup and operations.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: City prioritizes cultural events and downtown activation through infrastructure coordination; Arts Week represents economic development and community engagement investment.

processing_notes: Date discrepancy: title says '2023 Arts Week' but URL path includes '2024'; publication date is 2023-07-26 and events are 2023-07-28-30, confirming 2023 is correct
